MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, June 05, 2008:
Daniel Riley, attorney for plaintiff Pun Wun Lee and Jian Cheng as Trustees of the Pun Wun Lee and Jian Lian Cheng Living Trust; Pun Wun Lee as Trustee of the Pun Wun Lee and Jian Lian Cheng Living Trust, plaintiff; Philip Allingham, Esquire by limited scope representation for defendants Arturo Cabrera and Veronica Caberra, who are also present

Settlement conference is held. Case is settled. The parties entered into a signed agreement which is not filed with the Court this day. June 9, 2008 trial date vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
